headline: ₹0-50 Cr at risk (reputational, not direct P&L) — JSW Energy retains FTSE4Good ESG index spot, reinforcing long-term net zero commitment
what_matters: No P/E compression; valuation premium maintained versus sector laggards.
BRSR, GRI, CDP, TCFD frameworks referenced; no new regulatory deadlines or penalties triggered.
No immediate change in cost of capital; supports ongoing access to ESG-focused funds.
